Story.title: Story
Story.description: A short story posted to the public wall.

authorId.description: The UID of the user who posted the story.

isPremiumAuthor.description: Whether the author is a premium user.

Connection.title: Connection
Connection.description: A private connection between two users based on similar stories.

userIds.description: The UIDs of the two users in the connection.

storyIds.description: The IDs of the two stories that triggered the match.

Message.title: Message
Message.description: A private note exchanged between two matched users.

connectionId.description: The ID of the connection this message belongs to.

senderId.description: The UID of the user who sent the message.

User.title: User
User.description: A user profile with followed authors, display name, and usage limits.

displayName.description: The display name of the user.

followedAuthorIds.description: The UIDs of the authors followed by this user.

lastResetDate.description: The date (YYYY-MM-DD) when the match count was last reset.

isPremium.description: Whether the user has a premium subscription.
